PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sanford Margolis, via Zoom, for Ayesha Ibrahim, Petitioner.

The court advises that it has reviewed the petition and the papers in support of and is satisfied as to the issue of notice. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to this petition.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Sarmiento. Not reported.
